analysis.name: Zoho Mail
analysis.tagline: Secure & Professional Business Email for your Organization
analysis.value_proposition: Ad-free, privacy-focused business email with custom domains, strong admin controls, and deep integration across the Zoho ecosystem.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid-sized businesses seeking a cost-effective, privacy-conscious alternative to Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, especially those already using or considering other Zoho products.

features.name: custom domain email
features.description: Host business email on your own domain (e.g. you@yourcompany.com)

features.name: email encryption
features.description: End-to-end and in-transit encryption for email messages

features.name: openpgp integration
features.description: OpenPGP standard for end-to-end encrypted email, released to all users
features.evidence_quote: Zoho Mail releases OpenPGP integration to all users

features.name: email privacy controls
features.description: Privacy settings to prevent tracking pixels and control data sharing

features.name: threat protection
features.description: Anti-spam, anti-phishing, and malware protection for inbound email

features.name: physical security
features.description: Data center physical security measures for hosted email infrastructure

features.name: secure access / two-factor authentication
features.description: Two-factor authentication and secure login controls for accounts
features.evidence_quote: Zoho Mail two factor authentication circumvented by using desktop client

features.name: organization security
features.description: Organization-level security policies and controls for admins

features.name: admin console
features.description: Centralized admin dashboard for managing users, domains, and policies

features.name: email retention
features.description: Configurable email retention policies and archiving for compliance

features.name: email groups
features.description: Group email addresses that distribute messages to multiple users

features.name: offline access
features.description: Read and compose email without an active internet connection

features.name: mobile access
features.description: Native iOS and Android mobile apps for email access

features.name: desktop client
features.description: Dedicated desktop application for Windows/Mac email access

features.name: collaboration tools
features.description: Built-in collaboration features including shared calendars, tasks, and notes

features.name: easy migration
features.description: Guided migration tools from Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Exchange, and Amazon WorkMail

features.name: ai assistance
features.description: AI-powered email features (newly launched) for drafting, summarization, or smart replies

features.name: hybrid email
features.description: Hybrid email mode combining cloud and on-premise email infrastructure

features.name: enterprise features
features.description: Enterprise-grade capabilities including uninterrupted access and advanced controls

features.name: uninterrupted access
features.description: High-availability and SLA-backed uptime guarantees for enterprise accounts

features.name: night mode
features.description: Dark/night mode UI theme for the email client
features.evidence_quote: Announcing Night Mode, Quick Actions and More in Zoho Mail

features.name: quick actions
features.description: Inline quick-action buttons on emails for rapid triage without opening messages
features.evidence_quote: Announcing Night Mode, Quick Actions and More in Zoho Mail

features.name: rest api
features.description: REST API for developers to programmatically interact with Zoho Mail

features.name: cli access
features.description: Command-line interface for Zoho Mail administration and automation

features.name: developer platform
features.description: Developer platform and SDK for building integrations and extensions on Zoho Mail

features.name: free tier (no custom domain)
features.description: Free email accounts for up to 5 users without a custom domain
features.evidence_quote: Zoho free mail and Yandex (better?) alternative

features.name: zoho ecosystem integration
features.description: Native integration with Zoho CRM, Books, Projects, and other Zoho suite products
features.evidence_quote: Application suite built to improve team productivity and collaboration.

features.name: imap/pop3 support
features.description: Standard IMAP and POP3 protocol support for third-party email clients
features.evidence_quote: Zoho Mail two factor authentication circumvented by using desktop client

differentiators: No ads — explicitly marketed as ad-free business email
OpenPGP end-to-end encryption available to all users
Privacy-first positioning with email privacy controls
Deep integration with the broader Zoho product suite (Zoho One)
Significantly lower price point than Google Workspace and Microsoft 365

recent_ships.what: OpenPGP integration released to all users
recent_ships.source: Zoho Mail releases OpenPGP integration to all users (HN)
Announcing Night Mode, Quick Actions and More in Zoho Mail (HN)
AI Assistance New! — Zoho Mail landing page navigation
Hybrid email — Zoho Mail landing page navigation (marked as new feature)

praised: Low cost relative to Google Workspace and Microsoft 365
complaints: Service outages: 'Zoho Mail Is Down' (HN thread, 8 upvotes)
Account lockouts: 'Help – locked out of longstanding Zoho Mail account' (HN)
Two-factor authentication bypass via desktop client: '2FA circumvented by using desktop client' (HN)
Free tier limitations push users to look at alternatives: 'Zoho free mail and Yandex (better?) alternative' (HN)

free_tier.limits: 5 users, 5GB/user, no custom domain (zoho.com subdomain only)

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users max, 5GB/user, no custom domain, basic email features

tiers.name: Mail Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom domain, 5GB/user, email hosting for businesses, admin console

tiers.name: Mail Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50GB/user, S/MIME, email backup, white-label, advanced admin controls

tiers.name: Workplace
tiers.headline_inclusions: Email + Cliq (chat) + WorkDrive + Meeting, bundled collaboration suite

pricing.notes: Pricing page source was truncated; tier details drawn from Zoho's publicly known pricing structure. Workplace bundle competes directly with Google Workspace/M365 at lower price. Annual billing required for lowest rates. Free tier explicitly requires no custom domain.

recent_hn.title: Zog – A Terminal-Native CLI for Zoho Mail, Calendar, Contacts, WorkDrive
